name: Product Listing
description: This component displays a list of products based on product IDs or a category.

attribute_definition_groups.name: Product List Specification
attribute_definition_groups.description: Specify the list of product SKUs or a category.

attribute_definitions.name: Product IDs
attribute_definitions.description: Array of product SKUs in JSON format.

attribute_definitions.name: Category
attribute_definitions.description: Category ID to fetch products from.
